description: An MRO facility manages a pool of rotable parts (repairable components). An agent must track a part through its entire repair and reuse cycle.

nodes.task_description: Receive a broken component from an aircraft and update its status to 'unserviceable, awaiting repair'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly logs the incoming broken part.

nodes.task_description: Send the component to a repair shop and track its progress.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the part for repair and monitors its status.

nodes.task_description: When the repaired component returns, update its status to 'serviceable' and place it back into the rotable inventory pool, ready for use.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the repaired part, verifies its certification, and updates its status to available.
